content: What are all the things you can do? Show me your full capabilities

I can help with many tasks, Ajay! What would you like to do?

I can perform a wide range of tasks, Ajay, including but not limited to: running commands, sending emails, drafting emails, interacting with Google Drive, managing your Gmail inbox, answering questions, chatting, performing multi-step tasks, playing YouTube videos, reading screen content, taking photos and videos, controlling your desktop, setting reminders, and much more.
Take a screenshot of my screen

Screenshot taken, Ajay!

✓ Done: powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bounds = [Windows.Forms.SystemInformation]::VirtualScreen; $screenshot = [Drawing.Bitmap]::new($bounds.Width, $bounds.Height); $graph = [Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage($screenshot); $graph.CopyFromScreen($bounds.X, $bounds.Y, 0, 0, $bounds.Size); $screenshot.Save('C:\Users\Ajay\screenshot.png', [Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png);"

❌ Error: Command '['powershell', '-c', "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.SendKeys]::SendWait('Artificial Intelligence (AI) agents are computer programs designed to perform tasks that typically require human intelligence, such as learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. These agents can be used in a variety of applications, including virtual assistants, language translation, and expert systems.

One of the key benefits of AI agents is their ability to learn and improve over time. This is achieved through the use of machine learning algorithms, which allow the agent to analyze data and adjust its behavior accordingly.

AI agents can also be used to automate repetitive tasks, freeing up human workers to focus on more complex and creative tasks. Additionally, AI agents can provide 24/7 support and assistance, making them ideal for applications such as customer service and technical support.

However, there are also potential risks and challenges associated with the use of AI agents. For example, if an AI agent is not properly programmed or trained, it may make decisions that are not in line with human values or ethics.

Overall, AI agents have the potential to revolutionize the way we live and work, and their use is likely to become increasingly widespread in the coming years.')"]' timed out after 5 seconds

Hello Ajay, your name means 'unconquerable'!

Hello Ajay! Your name 'Ajay' is of Sanskrit origin, and it means 'unconquerable' or 'invincible'. It's a strong and meaningful name, Ajay!
What are all the things you can do? Show me your full capabilities

I'm here to help, Ajay! What would you like to do first?

I can perform a wide range of tasks, Ajay! I can launch applications, browse the internet, play music and videos, manage files and folders, and even help with coding and writing tasks. I can also assist with email, messaging, and social media. My capabilities include executing system commands, providing information on various topics, and offering suggestions for next steps. I'm here to help you with any questions or tasks you may have, Ajay!
